title: The Most Powerful Engine on Earth

beats.narration: This is the most powerful engine on Earth. And it builds itself.
beats.understand: cold-open ON the churning storm with a fast push and a short, punchy promise — the make-or-break hook

footage.intent: the churning spiral bands of the storm from orbit, a fast push so the very first second is alive

beats.narration: It builds from warm ocean — water above twenty-six degrees, pouring heat into the sky.
beats.understand: the one ingredient, warm sea, landed fast

footage.intent: warm tropical ocean under broken cloud

beats.narration: That warm, wet air rushes upward. It cools, it rains, and every drop releases heat that pulls up even more. The storm becomes its own engine, feeding on the sea.
beats.understand: the self-feeding heat-engine loop as a LIVING animated diagram — constant motion, non-cloud variety

beats.narration: Ranked by wind, a category five runs past two hundred and fifty — enough to erase a coastline.
beats.understand: a fast, bold wind-scale check landing the top-of-scale number

beats.narration: And at its heart, the eye. Dead calm, ringed by the strongest winds on the planet.
beats.understand: the showpiece — the eye — on the most dynamic storm window, fast push, lands as a reveal

footage.intent: a fast push into the churning heart of the storm — the peak

beats.narration: Warm water and air. That is all it is. And once it turns, nothing on Earth can stop it.
beats.understand: the thesis lands ON intensity — a fast push into the storm at full power (NOT a pull-out into calm fog); end on the peak
beats.text: Nothing on Earth can stop it.

footage.intent: push into the storm's spiral bands at full intensity as the thesis lands — end ON power, not fog
